sentences.arabic: قَرَأَتِ التِّلْمِيذَةُ: «الْبَعِيدُ عَنِ الْعَيْنِ بَعِيدٌ عَنِ الْقَلْبِ».
sentences.translation: Učenica je pročitala: «Daleko od oka, daleko od srca».
sentences.translationEn: The student read: «Far from the eye, far from the heart».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الِابْتِعَادَ يُضْعِفُ الْعَلَاقَاتِ أَحْيَانًا.
sentences.translation: To znači da udaljenost ponekad slabi veze.
sentences.translationEn: This means that distance sometimes weakens relationships.

sentences.translation: Njen prijatelj se preselio u drugi grad.
sentences.translationEn: Her friend moved to another city.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّهُمَا تَكَلَّمَا كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ وَبَقِيَتِ الصَّدَاقَةُ قَوِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Ali su svake sedmice razgovarali i prijateljstvo je ostalo jako.
sentences.translationEn: But they spoke every week and the friendship remained strong.
